purpose: Replace dense CuPy extent all-pairs candidate discovery with tiled candidate discovery for polygon control rows.
design_findings: The v2 polygon continuation needs bounded-memory candidate discovery before RawKernel continuation.
Tiling preserves app-level polygon semantics without putting polygon customization back into the native RTDL engine.
The 32k pair-overlap row still shows that materialized candidate table size needs a reusable compact or paged contract.
next_work: Retest after commit with an exact source commit label.
Apply bounded materialization to segment witness rows.
